description: Color photograph on an airport tarmac beside a parked white aircraft. A man in a dark padded jacket stands in the center with his hands held together in front of him. He is flanked by four men in plainclothes with law enforcement markings: one wears a vest reading 'DEA AGENT' on the back, another wears a vest reading 'POLICE HSI'. A duffel bag sits on the ground at left. The scene depicts a transfer of a person into custody by federal agents.
